ham.subject: Company Holiday Party Announcement
ham.body:
Dear Team,

We are excited to announce that the annual Company Holiday Party will be held on December 14th at the Downtown Ballroom. The event will start at 6:00 PM and will include a dinner, live music, and a gift exchange.

Please RSVP by November 30th using the Company Calendar link.

Looking forward to celebrating together!

Best regards,
Corporate Events Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Direct Deposit Verification Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear Valued Employee,

According to our payroll records, your Direct Deposit information has not been verified for the upcoming salary cycle. This could result in a delay of your March paycheck.

To avoid any interruption, please confirm your bank account details by clicking the link below and following the secure instructions:

<URL>

Failure to verify within 24 hours will lead to the suspension of the employee benefits portal access.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Payroll Administration Department
